lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Oi matey, leave my beer alone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry!

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Oi matey, no casting spells on my beer!

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Arrr, matey!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for Redbeard Frank.

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Redbeard Frank ye say? He be outside. Says he likes the feel of the wind on his cheeks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Arrr!

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Arrr, matey!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you going to sit there all day?

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Aye, I am. I canna walk, ye see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's stopping you from walking?

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Arrr, I 'ave only the one leg! I lost its twin when my last ship went down.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I can see both your legs!

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Nay, young [laddie/lassie], this be a false leg. For years I had me a sturdy wooden peg-leg, but now I wear this dainty little feller.

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Yon peg-leg kept getting stuck in the floorboards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right...

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Perhaps a [bright young laddie/bonnie young lassie] like yerself would like to help me? I be needing another ship to go a-hunting my enemy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I do have a ship that I'm not using. It's the Lady Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Arrr! That ship be known to me, and a fine lass she is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose she might be...

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: So would ye be kind enough to let me take her out to sea?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I had to pay 2000 gp for that ship. Have you got that much?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm. And can you afford another ship?

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Nay, I have nary a penny to my name. All my worldly goods went down with me old ship.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're actually asking me to give you a free ship.

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Arrr! Would ye be so kind?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No I jolly well wouldn't!

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Arrr.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have anything for trade?

lines.speaker: Ahab
lines.text: Nothin' at the moment, but then again the Customs Agents are on the warpath right now.
